panel.title: Writing Settings
panel.description: Define the goal, style, and constraints first, then generate content.

placeholder.topic: Example: Write a review article about rolling out a knowledge base product

tooltip.creativity: Higher values make the output more divergent. Lower values keep it steadier.

editor.emptyDescription: Set the topic, tone, and length, then click "Start Writing" to stream content directly into the editor.

streaming.failed: Writing failed. Please try again later.

overwriteConfirm.title: Start Writing Again
overwriteConfirm.description: The editor already contains content. Starting again will overwrite the current markdown with newly generated output. Do you want to continue?
